title: phase-field: A Pre-Registered SPARC Test of the Mode Identity Theory Coherence Scale
description: Locked-pipeline blind analysis testing whether the Mode Identity Theory coherence scale L_f = v_c^2/a_0 behaves like a real galactic coherence radius across the SPARC sample of 175 disk galaxies, after controlling for ordinary size scaling. The repository contains the analysis pipeline, the frozen pre-registration (claims, algorithm thresholds, sample cuts, and the acceptance scatter bound sigma_pred), synthetic rotation-curve tests, and figure-generation scripts. The transition radius r_t and flat-onset radius R_flat are tested against L_f and against a family of null size, velocity, and mass scalings; the dimensionless ratios eta_t and eta_flat are the primary registered outcome.

creators.name: Shatto, B.
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, St. Petersburg, FL, USA
